prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜参照校本部约第 62 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 48–62 区间，属中上水平理工类院校；该校在声誉监测中未见明显负面舆情或投档异常记录；抖音综合热度未进入前 100 名，短视频曝光量较低，报考关注度一般，未形成额外竞争升温信号；校本部石油与天然气工程为 A+ 学科、化学工程与技术为 A- 学科；克拉玛依校区开设石油工程、油气储运工程、化学工程与工艺等核心专业，与校本部共享学科资源，对相关专业考生有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 石油、化工类传统工科社会热度平稳，计算机类、自动化等专业热度较高；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 45.1 万，较 2025 年物理类+历史类合计约 46.2 万略有减少，物理类考生估算约 31.3 万（较 2025 年 32.1 万减少约 2.5%），竞争压力小幅缓解；学校位于新疆克拉玛依市，距安徽省较远，属跨省偏远地区办学；该校在安徽招生占比约 1.5%–2.8%（2021–2025 年），非主要生源地，地域偏远对部分考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 42731 名、2026 年扩招 5.2% 带来的竞争加剧、物理类考生小幅减少的缓解作用、以及地域偏远对报考热度的抑制，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较 2025 年小幅后移；预测最低位次约 44260 名，区间 43760–44760 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 45190→41731→38062→41801→42731, showing a fluctuating trend; from 2021 to 2023, rankings continuously moved forward (from 45190 to 38062), then fell back to 41801 in 2024, and further dropped to 42731 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4650 places in the last two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 42731; provincial science/physics category enrollment plans were 62 in 2021, 79 in 2022, 85 in 2023, 134 in 2024, and 135 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 142, an increase of 7 (+5.2%) compared to 2025, expanding enrollment broadens competition, putting pressure on rankings to move backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, referencing the main campus at approximately 62nd (2026), with recent rankings stable in the 48–62 range, belonging to upper-middle level science and engineering institutions; no significant negative public opinion or abnormal filing records were observed in reputation monitoring; Douyin comprehensive popularity did not enter the top 100, short video exposure is low, application attention is average, no additional competition heating signal; the main campus's petroleum and natural gas engineering is an A+ discipline, chemical engineering and technology is an A- discipline; the Karamay campus offers core majors such as petroleum engineering, oil and gas storage and transportation engineering, chemical engineering and technology, sharing disciplinary resources with the main campus, providing stable attraction for related major applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Traditional engineering fields like petroleum and chemical engineering have stable social popularity, while majors like computer science and automation are highly popular; the total number of candidates for the 2026 general college entrance examination in this province is approximately 451,000, slightly decreasing from about 462,000 for physics + history categories in 2025, with physics category candidates estimated at about 313,000 (a decrease of about 2.5% from 321,000 in 2025), slightly easing competitive pressure; the school is located in Karamay City, Xinjiang, far from Anhui Province, operating in a remote cross-province area; the school's enrollment proportion in Anhui is about 1.5%–2.8% (2021–2025), not a major source of students, and the remote location has a certain inhibitory effect on some candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 42731, the intensified competition from a 5.2% enrollment expansion in 2026, the slight easing effect from a small decrease in physics category candidates, and the inhibitory effect of remote location on application popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 44260, with a range of 43760–44760.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 43760–44760, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 43000), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Automation, Computer Science, and Petroleum Engineering; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., after 44500), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3 majors, prioritizing relatively less competitive majors like Resource Exploration Engineering and Accounting.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 10577→8947→9227→8054→8272, showing an overall upward trend; from 2021 to 2024, it continuously moved forward (from 10577 to 8054), with a slight backward shift to 8272 in 2025, accumulating a forward movement of about 2305 places over the past 4 years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 8272; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plans were 14 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 18 in 2024, and 17 in 2025, generally stable; the 2026 plan is 21, an increase of 4 (+23.5%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion, leading to a broader competitive landscape and pressure for rankings to move backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, referencing the main campus at approximately 62nd (2026), it is a mid-to-upper level science and engineering institution, with liberal arts majors not being its traditional strength; no significant negative public opinion or abnormal application records were observed in reputation monitoring; Douyin comprehensive popularity did not enter the top 100, indicating average application attention, without additional competition heating signals; the main campus's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in petroleum, geology, and other science and engineering fields; liberal arts enrollment majors (Accounting, Economics, Finance, Chinese Language and Literature, English, Russian, Ideological and Political Education) have some connection with the main campus's A-level disciplines (Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Foreign Languages and Literature A), but are not core advantageous directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for management and economics majors like Accounting and Economics is divided and wait-and-see, while foreign language majors are generally wait-and-see; the province's total number of general college entrance exam takers in 2026 is approximately 451,000, with history category examinees estimated at about 138,000 (a decrease of about 2.1% from 141,000 in 2025), slightly easing competitive pressure; the school is located in Karamay City, Xinjiang, far from Anhui Province; the school's enrollment in Anhui for liberal arts is very small (14–18 planned from 2021 to 2025), and the remote location has a more pronounced dampening effect on liberal arts candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8272, the intensified competition from a 23.5% enrollment expansion in 2026, the slight easing effect from a small decrease in history category examinees, and the suppression of application enthusiasm due to liberal arts not being the school's strength and its remote location, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly move backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9500, with a range of 9000–10000.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 9000–10000, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 8800), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors like Accounting and English; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., after 9800), it is recommended to use Tier 3 Russian as a safety, with Tier 2 majors like Ideological and Political Education and Chinese Language and Literature having relatively milder competition.
